# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Application CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'release/**'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  install-and-test:
    name: Install, Test & Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15

    permissions:
      contents: read
      checks: write

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Validate package-lock integrity
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm rebuild

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test -- --ci --coverage --reporters=default
        env:
          CI: true
          NODE_ENV: test

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          CI: true
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Upload build artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.sha }}
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 3
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs: install-and-test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'

    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write

    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Download build artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.sha }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Validate deployment target
        run: |
          ALLOWED_TARGETS="staging"
          DEPLOY_ENV="staging"
          if ! echo "$ALLOWED_TARGETS" | grep -qw "$DEPLOY_ENV"; then
            echo "::error::Invalid deployment target: $DEPLOY_ENV"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Authenticate to cloud provider
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_ROLE_ARN }}
          aws-region: ${{ vars.AWS_REGION }}
          role-session-name: github-ci-deploy-${{ github.run_id }}
          role-duration-seconds: 900

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "Deploying commit ${{ github.sha }} to staging"

          SANITIZED_SHA=$(echo "${{ github.sha }}" | grep -oE '^[a-f0-9]{40}$' || { echo "::error::Invalid SHA"; exit 1; })

          aws s3 sync dist/ "s3://${STAGING_BUCKET}/" \
            --delete \
            --no-progress \
            --metadata "commit=${SANITIZED_SHA},pipeline=${GITHUB_RUN_ID}"

          aws cloudfront create-invalidation \
            --distribution-id "${STAGING_DISTRIBUTION_ID}" \
            --paths "/*" \
            --no-cli-pager
        env:
          STAGING_BUCKET: ${{ vars.STAGING_S3_BUCKET }}
          STAGING_DISTRIBUTION_ID: ${{ vars.STAGING_CF_DISTRIBUTION_ID }}

      - name: Verify deployment health
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          STAGING_URL="${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}"

          if [ -z "$STAGING_URL" ]; then
            echo "::error::STAGING_URL is not configured"
            exit 1
          fi

          MAX_RETRIES=5
          RETRY_DELAY=10

          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" \
              --max-time 10 \
              --retry 0 \
              "${STAGING_URL}/health" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")

            if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
              echo "Staging deployment verified successfully"
              exit 0
            fi

            echo "Health check attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES returned HTTP $HTTP_STATUS, retrying in ${RETRY_DELAY}s..."
            sleep $RETRY_DELAY
          done

          echo "::error::Staging deployment health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
          exit 1
